title: amsonia ciliata var. ciliata
intro: Amsonia ciliata var. ciliata, also known as whorled bluestem, is a perennial plant belonging to the Apocynaceae family, native to North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, which make it useful in treating various health issues. Whorled bluestem has been traditionally used to relieve menstrual cramps, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory problems, offering several health benefits. Herbal preparations of Amsonia ciliata var. ciliata include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support women's health and alleviate symptoms of menopause.
